hook.summary: A glowing soccer ball pulses with electricity on a pitch before revealing legendary player cards.
hook.visual_action: A soccer ball on a field pulses with electricity and opens to reveal player cards.

scene_flow: A glowing soccer ball pulses with electricity on a pitch.
Rapid reveal of high-tier player cards like Ronaldo and Correa.
More player cards are revealed in quick succession with flashy effects.
Final logo reveal with FIFA RIVALS and app store links.
Closing screen with the tagline YOUR PATH TO FIFA WORLD CUP 26 STARTS HERE.
on_screen_text: YOUR PATH TO FIFA WORLD CUP 26 STARTS HERE
cta_text: Download on the App Store / Get it on Google Play
audience_proxy: Male soccer fans and gamers aged 13-35 who enjoy card collection and sports management games.
